title: PET Bottle Rocket
description: Make a Water Bottle Rocket! Inspired by STEM Learning.
body: # PET Bottle Rocket [](https://modfest.net/1.20) # What is this? This mod allows you to make a Water-powered Rocket! No pressure needed. # What's with the name? Plastic bottles are called ペットボトル (PET bottle) in Japanese. # How do I make one Make a Bottle. These plastic scraps can be found in Blacksmith chests. You can either fill it with water and then put the cap on or you can put the cap on first and then fill it with water. Fill it like you would for a glass bottle. Do NOT forget the caps. They generate in dungeon chests. Craft fins and rocket cap. And assemble the rocket! # Usage You can throw or place them down and Sneak+Right Click to activate the rocket. It will deal some knockback and deal some damage if it hits something. Upon hitting a solid block, if activated or thrown in Survival Mode, will drop 4 Plastic Scrap and 6 Paper so you can recover some of the material for the rocket. Be warned that this is not an accurate shot and will likely deviate quite a bit.
